Software version outdated 
Download the latest ROM for this device model and flash it.

This user account has no access to the advanced ROM flashing permission. 
Apply for the permission in the UPM system and try again.

The O+ Cloud service interface {1} did not return the designated data field: {2} 
The O+ Cloud services failed. If the issue persists after multiple attempts, please report the issue to the tool maintenance team for analysis and processing through a background technical support representative.
